# misp_sharing_group (Data Source)

Look up a MISP sharing group by id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "misp_sharing_group" "partners" {
  id = "2"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Numeric sharing group id.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean)
- `description` (String)
- `local` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `org_id` (String)
- `releasability` (String)
- `roaming` (Boolean)
- `uuid` (String)
